reason: Confirmed agent->finish-work-entrypoint mapping (claude/opencode/codex) and the per-agent distribution model that motivates selection-gated multi-target injection. Authoritative source for the path constants.

Backend contract overview: integrate-vs-adapter command family, .omv/integrations.toml as integration desired-state truth, finalize-boundary trigger convention, and managed-block identifier rules (integration-{capability}).

Module boundaries: omv integrate apply orchestration sequence (load integrations.toml -> re-detect -> plan -> targeted safety -> persist), and that adapter/spec host projection lives in adapter.rs / app integration branches.
Any new finalize-boundary status/failure copy must be catalog-driven; failure reason codes stay stable machine IDs while display messages localize.
finalize-boundary partial/mismatch and no-surface cases must conform to the typed-error + structured JSON failure contract with stable reason codes.

Cross-provider dependency (Trellis capability target set derived from agent provider selection) crosses storage(integrations.toml)/app(integrate apply)/projection layers; consistency guidance applies.
